title: Set up {{name}}
description: Complete these 3 steps to make your agents fully operational. Each step launches a guided AI session directly in Chat IA.
step1DescriptionNew: Analyze the selected repositories and produce the reference docs your agents will rely on.
step1DescriptionBrownfield: Repo-level context already exists. Generate the shared workspace context that connects all repos together.
step2Description: Measure what the system understands about the codebase and surface any remaining blind spots.
step3Description: Review the current delivery scope before development starts so the workspace is operational end to end.
step3NoPmDescription: Connect a PM tool first to run the PM Challenge.
readyDescription: All 3 onboarding steps are complete. Your agents now have the context they need.
